offers.title: Sql server migration to Azure
offers.description: Modernize SQL Server workloads with a structured move to Azure SQL services, improving performance, scalability and long-term cost efficiency for your data estate.

offers.title: Unified data estate migration
offers.description: Consolidate cloud data into a connected cloud architecture using Azure Synapse or Fabric, creating a modern foundation for BI and advanced analytics.

offers.title: Microsoft Fabric PoC
offers.description: Stand up a working Fabric environment that connects your data sources and shows your team how to adopt OneLake, semantic models, and capabilities with hands-on guidance.

offers.title: Data readiness assessment for AI
offers.description: Understand whether your data is clean, governed and governed well enough to power ML/AI effectively and get a roadmap to improve quality, structure, and readiness.

offers.title: Application migration to Azure
offers.description: Move applications to Microsoft Azure with a guided approach that improves resilience, reduces risk, and builds a strong foundation for future modernization.

offers.title: Vmware migrations
offers.description: Transition VMware workloads to Azure using a proven discovery, planning, and execution framework that simplifies complexity and delivers a stable cloud environment.

offers.title: Microsoft sentinel security essentials PoC
offers.description: Evaluate Microsoft Sentinel in your environment with a structured PoC that tests log-based SIEM and SOAR can improve threat detection and operational response.

offers.title: Teams voice in a box
offers.description: Test Microsoft Teams as a complete telephony solution through a focused proof of concept that explores calling, configuration, user experience, and cost.

offers.title: AI application modernization assessment
offers.description: Evaluate how AI and modern cloud services can enhance or modernize an existing application and get a prioritized, actionable roadmap for future development.

offers.title: Copilot extensibility workshop
offers.description: Learn how to extend Microsoft Copilot for M365 using Azure AI, Power Platform, and custom APIs, with practical guidance for connecting Copilot to your business data.

offers.title: Custom Copilot development
offers.description: Build tailored Copilot experiences that integrate business logic, domain knowledge, and data so tasks to create differentiated, context-specific AI experiences for your team.

offers.title: AI agent in a day workshop
offers.description: Explore real-world use cases for AI agents and create an early prototype in a focused session that brings clarity to design, capability, and potential impact.

offers.title: Azure HPC core PoC
offers.description: A guided introduction to Azure HPC designed for lightweight workloads, helping teams experience cloud-based performance with validating early technical decisions.

offers.title: Copilot extensibility workshop
offers.description: A real-scale HPC proof of concept that introduces advanced scheduling, core configuration, and higher performance configurations for growing computational needs.

offers.title: Azure HPC max PoC
offers.description: A full scale Azure HPC proof of concept built for demanding workloads including virtualization, engineering, and AI to testing large-scale performance and efficiency.

offers.title: Azure HPC migration assessment
offers.description: Evaluate your existing HPC environment and receive a tailored migration path that includes performance modeling, cost projections and a practical rollout timeline.
